title: How does monday AI learn within a board? For example, if I extract a value from one item, how can I train monday AI so that it applies the same logic and understands that this is the type of value I expect for other items on the board?
excerpt:

posts.author: Durga (Durga)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m building a leads board where I use monday AI to extract values from incoming items (like project IDs, dates, etc.).

If I extract a correct value in one item, how can I “teach” monday AI that this is the type of value I expect so it applies the same logic to other items automatically?

Basically, I’m trying to understand whether monday AI learns from board-level context and past outputs, or if I have to manually fine-tune prompts each time.
